017package org.apache.juneau.rest.server;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Shorts.*;
020
021import java.lang.reflect.*;
022import java.time.*;
023import java.util.concurrent.*;
024import java.util.function.*;
025
026import org.apache.juneau.commons.reflect.*;
027import org.apache.juneau.http.response.*;
028import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.arg.*;
029import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.metrics.*;
030import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.stats.*;
031import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.tracing.*;
032
033/**
034 * A specialized invoker for methods that are called during a servlet request.
035 *
036 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
037 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/RestContext">RestContext</a>
038 * </ul>
039 */
040public class RestOpInvoker extends MethodInvoker {
041
042   private final RestOpArg[] opArgs;
043   private final Supplier<Object> resourceSupplier;
044
045   /**
046    * Constructor.
047    *
048    * @param m The method being wrapped.
049    * @param opArgs The parameter resolvers.
050    * @param stats The instrumentor.
051    */
052   public RestOpInvoker(java.lang.reflect.Method m, RestOpArg[] opArgs, MethodExecStats stats) {
053      this(m, opArgs, stats, null);
054   }
055
056   /**
057    * Constructor.
058    *
059    * @param m The method being wrapped.
060    * @param opArgs The parameter resolvers.
061    * @param stats The instrumentor.
062    * @param resourceSupplier Optional resource supplier.  When <jk>null</jk>, falls back to {@link RestSession#getResource()}.
063    */
064   public RestOpInvoker(java.lang.reflect.Method m, RestOpArg[] opArgs, MethodExecStats stats, Supplier<Object> resourceSupplier) {
065      super(m, stats);
066      this.opArgs = opArgs;
067      this.resourceSupplier = resourceSupplier;
068   }
069
070   /**
071    * Invokes this method from the specified {@link RestSession}.
072    *
073    * @param opSession The REST call.
074    * @throws Exception If an error occurred during either parameter resolution or method invocation.
075    */
076   public void invoke(RestOpSession opSession) throws Exception {
077      invoke(opSession, false);
078   }
079
080   /**
081    * Invokes this method as the main {@code @RestOp} handler from the specified {@link RestOpSession},
082    * firing per-request observability hooks ({@link MetricsRecorder} and {@link TracerHook}) around the
083    * underlying invocation.
084    *
085    * <p>
086    * Called by {@link RestOpSession#run()} for the {@code @RestOp}-annotated handler method. Pre / post
087    * call methods (those invoked via {@link RestContext#preCall(RestOpSession)} /
088    * {@link RestContext#postCall(RestOpSession)}) continue to use {@link #invoke(RestOpSession)} so the
089    * observability boundary stays anchored on the user-facing handler.
090    *
091    * <h5 class='section'>Virtual-thread dispatch</h5>
092    * <p>
093    * When the operation opts into virtual threads via {@code @Rest(virtualThreads=true)} or
094    * {@code @RestOp(virtualThreads=true)} and the runtime is Java 21+, the entire body of this method
095    * (parameter resolution, observability scope opening, handler invocation, observability close) is
096    * submitted to the resource's virtual-thread executor and the request thread blocks on completion.
097    * That keeps observability scoping correct (open and close run on the same thread) while letting
098    * blocking I/O inside the handler park a virtual thread instead of the carrier.
099    *
100    * <h5 class='section'>{@link CompletableFuture} returns</h5>
101    * <p>
102    * When the handler returns a {@link CompletionStage}, the observability close is deferred to the
103    * future's {@code whenComplete} callback so metrics and traces capture the actual completion time
104    * and outcome — not the synchronous "future returned" moment.
105    *
106    * @param opSession The REST call.
107    * @throws Exception If an error occurred during either parameter resolution or method invocation.
108    */
109   @SuppressWarnings({
110      "java:S3776", // Cognitive complexity acceptable for REST operation invocation dispatch (virtual-thread + observability paths)
111      "java:S1181"  // Throwable (incl. Error) is intentionally captured to propagate it across the virtual-thread boundary; the caller rethrows Errors as-is.
112   })
113   public void invokeOp(RestOpSession opSession) throws Exception {
114      var vtExec = opSession.getContext().isVirtualThreadsEnabled()
115         ? opSession.getRestContext().getVirtualThreadExecutor()
116         : null;
117
118      if (vtExec == null) {
119         invoke(opSession, true);
120         return;
121      }
122
123      var f = new CompletableFuture<Void>();
124      vtExec.execute(() -> {
125         try {
126            invoke(opSession, true);
127            f.complete(null);
128         } catch (Throwable t) {
129            f.completeExceptionally(t);
130         }
131      });
132
133      try {
134         f.get();
135      } catch (ExecutionException ee) {
136         Throwable cause = ee.getCause() == null ? ee : ee.getCause();
137         if (cause instanceof Exception ex)
138            throw ex;
139         if (cause instanceof Error err)
140            throw err;
141         throw new InternalServerError(cause);
142      } catch (InterruptedException ie) {
143         Thread.currentThread().interrupt();
144         throw new InternalServerError(ie);
145      }
146   }
147
148   @SuppressWarnings({
149      "java:S3776", // Cognitive complexity acceptable for the dispatch hot path.
150      "resource"    // BeanStore is not owned here; its lifecycle is managed by RestContext.
151   })
152   private void invoke(RestOpSession opSession, boolean observable) throws Exception {
153      var args = new Object[opArgs.length];
154      for (var i = 0; i < opArgs.length; i++) {
155         ParameterInfo pi = inner().getParameter(i);
156         try {
157            args[i] = opArgs[i].resolve(opSession);
158         } catch (BasicHttpException e) {
159            throw e;
160         } catch (Exception e) {
161            throw new BadRequest(e, "Could not resolve parameter {0} of type ''{1}'' on method ''{2}''.", i, pi.getParameterType(), getFullName());
162         }
163      }
164
165      RestRequest req = opSession.getRequest();
166      RestResponse res = opSession.getResponse();
167
168      MetricsRecorder recorder = NoOpMetricsRecorder.INSTANCE;
169      Scope tracerScope = NoOpTracerHook.NoOpScope.INSTANCE;
170      long startNanos = 0L;
171      Throwable observed = null;
172      boolean observabilityDeferred = false;
173      var opContext = opSession.getContext();
174      // observable=true means this is the @RestOp handler (not a pre/post call), AND observability is not
175      // explicitly disabled for this operation via @Rest(observability="false") or @RestOp(observability="false").
176      boolean effectivelyObservable = observable && opContext.isObservabilityEnabled();
177      if (effectivelyObservable) {
178         var bs = opSession.getRestContext().getBeanStore();
179         recorder = bs.getBean(MetricsRecorder.class).orElse(NoOpMetricsRecorder.INSTANCE);
180         var tracer = bs.getBean(TracerHook.class).orElse(NoOpTracerHook.INSTANCE);
181         tracerScope = tracer.startSpan(req);
182         startNanos = System.nanoTime();
183      }
184
185      try {
186         RestSession session = opSession.getRestSession();
187
188         var target = resourceSupplier == null ? session.getResource() : resourceSupplier.get();
189         Object output = super.invoke(target, args);
190
191         // Handle manual call to req.setDebug().
192         Boolean debug = req.getAttribute("Debug").as(Boolean.class).orElse(null);
193         if (debug == Boolean.TRUE) {
194            session.debug(true);
195         } else if (debug == Boolean.FALSE) {
196            session.debug(false);
197         }
198
199         if (! inner().hasReturnType(Void.TYPE) && (nn(output) || ! res.getOutputStreamCalled()))
200            res.setContent(output);
201
202         if (effectivelyObservable && output instanceof CompletionStage<?> stage) {
203            observabilityDeferred = true;
204            deferObservability(stage, recorder, tracerScope, startNanos, opSession, opContext.getMetricName(), opContext.getMetricTags());
205         }
206
207      } catch (IllegalAccessException | IllegalArgumentException e) {
208         observed = e;
209         throw new InternalServerError(e, "Error occurred invoking method ''{0}''.", inner().getNameFull());
210      } catch (InvocationTargetException e) {
211         Throwable e2 = e.getTargetException();
212         observed = e2;
213         res.setStatus(500);  // May be overridden later.
214         res.setContent(opSession.getRestContext().convertThrowable(e2));
215      } finally {
216         if (effectivelyObservable && ! observabilityDeferred) {
217            int status;
218            if (observed != null)
219               status = deriveStatus(observed);
220            else {
221               status = res.getStatus();
222               if (status == 0)
223                  status = 200;
224            }
225            try {
226               tracerScope.setStatusCode(status);
227               if (nn(observed))
228                  tracerScope.setError(observed);
229            } finally {
230               try {
231                  tracerScope.close();
232               } finally {
233               var elapsed = Duration.ofNanos(System.nanoTime() - startNanos);
234               var pathTemplate = resolveUriTemplate(opSession);
235               recorder.record(getFullName(), req.getMethod(), pathTemplate, status, elapsed, observed, opContext.getMetricName(), opContext.getMetricTags());
236               }
237            }
238         }
239      }
240   }
241
242   private void deferObservability(CompletionStage<?> stage, MetricsRecorder recorder, Scope tracerScope,
243         long startNanos, RestOpSession opSession, String metricName, String metricTags) {
244      var fullName = getFullName();
245      var httpMethod = opSession.getRequest().getMethod();
246      var pathTemplate = resolveUriTemplate(opSession);
247      stage.whenComplete((value, error) -> {
248         Throwable err = unwrapCompletionError(error);
249         int status = deriveStatus(err);
250         try {
251            tracerScope.setStatusCode(status);
252            if (err != null)
253               tracerScope.setError(err);
254         } finally {
255            try {
256               tracerScope.close();
257            } finally {
258            var elapsed = Duration.ofNanos(System.nanoTime() - startNanos);
259            recorder.record(fullName, httpMethod, pathTemplate, status, elapsed, err, metricName, metricTags);
260            }
261         }
262      });
263   }
264
265   private static Throwable unwrapCompletionError(Throwable t) {
266      if (t instanceof CompletionException && t.getCause() != null)
267         return t.getCause();
268      return t;
269   }
270
271   private static int deriveStatus(Throwable err) {
272      if (err == null)
273         return 200;
274      if (err instanceof BasicHttpException bhe)
275         return bhe.getStatusCode();
276      return 500;
277   }
278
279   private static String resolveUriTemplate(RestOpSession opSession) {
280      try {
281         var pp = opSession.getContext().getPathPattern();
282         return pp == null ? "" : pp;
283      } catch (RuntimeException e) {
284         // Defensive: getPathPattern() dereferences pathMatchers[0]; protect against any unusual routing setup.
285         return "";
286      }
287   }
288}
